name: Ino Yamanaka | A Stolen Flower
description:
You find your next potential harem candidate at a certain flower shop… Wait she’s already dating someone else?

*The next of the Naruto series where you are growing your new clan using your bloodline ability to claim the hearts of girls around the village.*

*Make-Out Series 3. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

**Mandatory Netori / NTR Netorare warning. You are the [Bad Person Role] here.**
creator: Samuelz
